one_time_description: Colonial Reserve Claim advance payment of $30,000,000 received from Government of Canada, used in part to repay a bank loan of $25,870,000 for the O'Keefe lands purchase
economic_notes: Band owns OKIB Group of Companies (forestry, operations, assets, management services LPs), Okanagan Indian Band Land Holding Company Ltd., and Okanagan Band Development Corporation. Purchased O'Keefe lands in August 2022 for $25,870,000. Band is part of the Okanagan Nation comprising seven Indian Bands. OKIB Group of Companies generated net income of $2,136,674 in 2023.
notes: Audit is qualified due to tangible capital assets acquired prior to 2010 being expensed at acquisition — cost and dates not determinable, affecting TCA carrying value, surplus and accumulated surplus for multiple years. Colonial claim advance payment of $30M is a major one-time item recorded as revenue; the actual cash was received April 13, 2023 (after year-end) but the receivable is on the balance sheet. Long-term debt jumped from $10.7M to $39.1M primarily due to a $25.87M bank loan for the O'Keefe lands purchase. num_gbes=3 representing OKIB Group of Companies, Okanagan Indian Band Land Holding Company Ltd., and Okanagan Band Development Corporation (all accounted for under modified equity method). num_subsidiaries=1 being 631640 B.C. Ltd. (consolidated). Funds held in Ottawa Trust of $5,738,076 not included in cash. osr calculated as total revenue minus federal government transfers minus provincial government transfers.
